message:
feat(frankenterm-core): add DEC charset translation and grid fill_all for DECALN

Cursor charset support:
- Add DEC Special Graphics charset translation (ESC ( 0) mapping ASCII
  0x60-0x7E to Unicode line-drawing and symbol characters
- Add charset_slots [u8; 4] and active_charset fields to Cursor for
  G0-G3 charset slot tracking
- Add single_shift support (SS2/SS3) with consume_single_shift()
- Persist charset state in SavedCursor for DECSC/DECRC round-trip
- translate_charset() public function for charset designator dispatch
- Cursor methods: effective_charset(), consume_single_shift(),
  designate_charset(), reset_charset()
- Re-export translate_charset from crate root

Grid fill_all:
- Add Grid::fill_all(ch) method for DECALN (Screen Alignment Test)
  which fills every cell with the given character and default attributes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
